production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, None], "v": [1, 2]})
print(int(df["id"].isna().sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Campo required: isna().sum cuenta nulls que violan el contrato (T1-A).
Solo required con n>0 entra al mapa de violaciones; optional se omite (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [None]})
print("fail" if df["id"].isna().any() else "pass")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Gate: null en required → fail sin rellenar en silencio (T1-A fail-closed).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None]})
df["was_null"] = df["monto"].isna()
df["monto"] = df["monto"].fillna(0)
print(df["was_null"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: was_null antes de fillna preserva señal de ausencia (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, None, None, 2.0])
rate = float(s.isna().mean())
print("blocked" if rate > 0.3 else "ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Cap 0.3: rate 0.5 → blocked, no imputar (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, None])
med = s.median()
print(s.fillna(med).tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Mediana skipna e imputación fillna; vector final documentado (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 1, 2], "b": [0, 0, 9]})
print(int(df.duplicated(keep=False).sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Duplicados exactos con keep=False marcan ambas filas → 2 (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]})
n = df.groupby("cliente_id")["region"].nunique()
print(n[n > 1].index.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Conflicto de atributo: nunique(region)>1 por clave (T2-A); C001.
Una fila sin dups ni multi-región → clean (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
qmask = df.duplicated(subset=["id"], keep=False)
quarantine = df[qmask]
clean = df.drop_duplicates(subset=["id"], keep="first")
print(len(quarantine), len(clean))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Quarantine conserva dups; clean keep first (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a"], "batch": ["b1", "b2"]})
quarantine = df[df.duplicated(subset=["id"], keep=False)].copy()
print(quarantine.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Evidencia batch se conserva en quarantine.columns (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "b"], "v": [1, 2]})
print("card_ok" if df["id"].nunique() == len(df) else "card_fail")
exercises.justification_from_packet: nunique(id)==len(df) ⇒ card_ok para join 1:1 (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([" lima ", "CUSCO"])
print(s.str.strip().str.title().tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: strip+title normaliza strings de región (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(["S/1.5", "S/2"])
v = s.str.replace("S/", "", regex=False).astype(float)
print(float(v.sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Parse PEN sintético: replace S/ + float; suma 3.5 (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region_raw": ["lima"]})
df["region"] = df["region_raw"].str.title()
print(df["region_raw"].tolist(), df["region"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: region canónica no pisa region_raw para auditoría (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, -2.0, 3.0])
print((s < 0).tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Domain bound monto<0 → lista booleana de domain_error (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 100.0])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
mask = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[mask].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: IQR 1.5 marca outliers estadísticos (p. ej. 100) (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, -1.0])
val = float(s.iloc[2])
print("error" if val < 0 else "ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Prioriza error de dominio sobre flag IQR (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
print([c for c in required if c not in df.columns])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Gate de schema T4-A: columnas required ausentes se listan como drift; con solo id frente a ['id','monto'] falta monto.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "inicio": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-06-01"]),
    "fin": pd.to_datetime(["2024-02-01", "2024-05-01"]),
})
mask = df["fin"] < df["inicio"]
print(df.index[mask].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Regla cross-field fin<inicio devuelve índices (T4-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
missing = [c for c in ["id", "monto"] if c not in df.columns]
print("drift" if missing else "schema_ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Fail-closed ante drift de schema (T4-A): si faltan required se imprime 'drift' y no se sigue el pipeline como schema_ok.

exercises.code:
rows_in = 10
q = 3
print(rows_in - q)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Métrica del quality gate T4-B: rows_clean = rows_in − quarantine; publica el conteo limpio aunque el batch tenga rechazos.

exercises.code:
audit = [{"event": "start"}]
audit.append({"event": "quarantine"})
print(len(audit))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Audit append-only: len crece sin reescribir (T4-B).

exercises.code:
n_q = 1
print(bool(n_q == 0))
exercises.justification_from_packet: pass=False si quarantine>0; métricas se publican igual (T4-B).

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: T1-A: required con nulls provoca violación/cuarentena o fail del gate, no imputar a ciegas.
T2-A: exacto = filas idénticas; conflicto = misma clave con atributos distintos.
T3-A: conservar region_raw permite auditar la forma canónica sin perder el original.
T3-B: IQR sin domain bounds puede marcar colas legítimas de negocio como error.
T4-B: el gate debe publicar métricas y cuarentena aunque pass=False.
